title: Product Roadmap
excerpt:
Hi - Do you have a product roadmp anywhere? 
I’d like to see what is coming up - expecially new functionality. 
Thanks

posts.author: NasMan (Nas Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - Do you have a product roadmp anywhere?

I’d like to see what is coming up - expecially new functionality.

Thanks

posts.author: fakof14 (Marcin)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday.com

monday.com Work OS: the visual platform that manages everything

monday.com is so visual and intuitive, you don’t need training. Create your ideal workflow in minutes or choose from 200+ ready-made templates to get started instantly!

posts.author: digodk (Diogo Klein)
posts.cookedHtml: Doesn’t seem to be working anymore. Is there a new link?

posts.author: brooks (Brooks Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: I noticed the same thing. Apparently the public roadmap is dead.

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: You can find the public roadmap at this link now: https://view.monday.com/39325084-bfc5c74be3d760bef14f4cd3ea04ffc2

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
brooks:

Apparently the public roadmap is dead.

Looks like the URL shortcut is just being re-directed to the wrong page.

posts.author: brooks (Brooks Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Even this link is dead now.

RIP Roadmap

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: If you reach out to their customer support they will send you an NDA to sign and then provide the roadmap. At least that was my experience.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
